name: Natalie Anderson
signature_move: At Final 5, Natalie secretly voted out Alec instead of Keith, blindsiding her own alliance to avenge her ally Jeremy's elimination — a move so subtle that her allies didn't realize what happened until it was too late.
strategy_summary: After her twin sister Nadiya was the first person eliminated, Natalie channeled her grief into one of the most impressive revenge games in Survivor history. She embedded herself in the majority alliance, bided her time, and then systematically dismantled the power structure from within using two idol plays and one of the most subtle blindsides ever executed.
fun_fact: Natalie and her twin Nadiya were previously on The Amazing Race (Seasons 21 and 24), making Natalie the first Amazing Race alum to win Survivor.
